Emscripten integration, FreeRTOS utilities, SDL management, and build configuration for applib targets.

## Folders
- **[emscripten](emscripten/README.md)**: Emscripten integration for Pebble firmware with graphics, resources, tests, and JavaScript bindings.
- **[overrides](overrides/README.md)**: Memory allocation utilities, mutex handling types, and type definitions for FreeRTOS components.
- **[sdl](sdl/README.md)**: Example SDL program, SDL application and graphics management, shim functions, and Waf build script.

## Files
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Configures and builds the applib targets for different backends with options for SDL and Emscripten.
